<yellow>- For node `%s`, its type is `%s`. (Is the requirement of this node wrapped by command_permission module: `%s`)
<red>◉ The command nodes is empty. Did you input the wrong command string?

command_permission.command.set_false: <orange>發出指令以<green>禁止<orange>所有玩家使用指令 `%s`: %s <hover:show_text:'<green>複製到剪貼簿'><click:copy_to_clipboard:'%s'><green>[複製]</click></hover>
command_permission.command.unset: <orange>發出指令以<green>取消<orange>指令 `%s` 的需求：%s <hover:show_text:'<green>複製到剪貼簿'><click:copy_to_clipboard:'%s'><green>[複製]</click></hover>
